text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I deliver a huge stack of fan letters to
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, so many letters! I can totally feel
everyone's support! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I have some time right now. Can I read
them?
choice_data_list: Of course, that's why I brought them.
Of course, that's why I brought them.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Okay, let me take a look...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"You burn up the track like a hot rod! You're the
best!" Aww, how nice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"I'm so looking forward to your next race!" Then
I'll give you a run to remember!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what's this one say? "I love your singing,
Maruzensky! You are my fire!"

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's like they're saying I'm their one desire! ♪ I'm
so happy they enjoyed my concert!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I think that's everything. That was so much
fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All of these letters are so full of emotion... It
really makes me realize how much support I have.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I want to run not only for myself, but for
everyone's enjoyment...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It really seems like my feelings are reaching
people.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You think so too, don't you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You think so too, don't you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'll kick it into high gear again for my
next race.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be happy to run, sing, and dance... They'll fall
even more head over heels for me!
